scenes.prompt: A lone survivalist stands at the edge of a frozen lake at dawn, breath visible in the frigid air. He wears a heavy wool coat, thick beard frosted white, carrying a worn leather rucksack. Snow-covered pine trees stretch to the horizon under a pale orange sky. Cinematic wide shot, natural lighting, hyper-realistic.

The survivalist kneels beside a small campfire in a dense forest clearing, carefully feeding dry branches into the flames. Smoke curls upward through the canopy. Close-up on weathered hands and the warm glow of the fire against the cold blue forest. Cinematic medium shot, firelight, shallow depth of field.

The survivalist cautiously crosses a narrow fallen log over a rushing icy river. Water churns violently below. He grips a walking stick for balance, face set with concentration. Snow falls lightly. Cinematic side angle, motion blur on water, dramatic tension.

Inside a makeshift lean-to shelter, the survivalist examines a hand-drawn map by candlelight. Shadows dance on rough bark walls. His equipment is neatly arranged: a knife, rope, compass, and dried meat. Cinematic close-up, warm candlelight, intimate atmosphere.

The survivalist tracks animal footprints through deep snow in a silent white forest. He moves low and quiet, scanning the treeline. A distant mountain looms behind clouds. Cinematic tracking shot, muted color palette, suspenseful mood.

A sudden blizzard engulfs the survivalist as he struggles uphill through waist-deep snow. Wind whips his coat, visibility near zero. He shields his face with one arm, pressing forward. Cinematic wide shot, heavy particle effects, desaturated tones, raw survival energy.

The survivalist reaches a mountain summit at golden hour. He stands silhouetted against a vast wilderness panorama, arms at his sides, breathing hard. The storm has cleared. Warm golden light floods the scene. Cinematic hero shot, epic scale, triumphant atmosphere.
